log.message: 1 - All [Copy Files, Compile, Restart Server, Load Files]
2 - Load Only [Copy Files, Load Files] (No Compile, No Restart Server)
3 - Copy Only [Copy Files] (No Compile, No Restart Server, No Load Files)
4 - Deploy Only [Copy Files, Compile, Restart Server] (No Load Files)

macrodef.name: install.option.all
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 1 - All

log.message: Authentication fail - Cannot Execute Load Sequence

macrodef.name: install.option.upgrademandatory
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 77 - Upgrade Mandatory

macrodef.name: install.option.loadonly
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 2 - LoadOnly

log.message: Authentication fail - Cannot Execute Load Sequence

macrodef.name: install.option.copyonly
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 3 - Copy Only

macrodef.name: install.option.deployonly
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 4 - Deploy Only

macrodef.name: install.option.buildimage
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 44 - Build Image

macrodef.name: install.option.tp
macrodef.description: Install Temp Patch Unattended - Option 50 - TempPatch Installation

macrodef.name: install.option.tp.deployonly.norestart
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes for TP - Option 52 - Deploy Only - No Restart

log.message: ========= Installation Completed, Patch will take effect after Server restart ==========

macrodef.name: install.option.tp.deployonly.restart
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes for TP - Option 54 - Deploy Only - Restart

log.message: ========= Installation Completed, Please wait for Server restart ==========
========= Installation Completed, Patch will take effect after Server restart ==========

macrodef.name: install.option.listcontent
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 5 - List Package Content

macrodef.name: install.option.abort
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 6 - Abort Installation

macrodef.name: install.option.abort.user
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Option 66 - Installation aborted because launched by wrong User

macrodef.name: install.end.abort.log
macrodef.description: Install Configuration Changes - Display end of Installation Message while aborted because launched by wrong User

log.message: Installation must be executed as Linux User [${installation.unix.user}] !
These Failed installation Logs have been moved to folder [${installer.basedir}_${user}_${currentDate}]
1- Current Installation folder [${basedir}] must be owned by [${installation.unix.user}].
- As Linux User [${user}], switch folder ownership
2- Once completed, re-start package installation as [${installation.unix.user}]:

macrodef.name: install.end.log
macrodef.description: Installation End Messsage

log.message: Uninstaller Archive File Generated on File [${uninstaller.jar}]
see the error log for details: ${error.log}

target.name: force.deploy.sitemod
target.description: Deploy wtSafeArea/siteMod files to the Windchill home directory.

macrodef.name: install.siteMod.changes
macrodef.description: Deploy wtSafeArea/siteMod files to the Windchill home directory.

macrodef.name: reload.actions
macrodef.description: Reload Action/ActionModels.

log.message: Actions/ActionModels reloaded -> Verify Method Server Logs in case of any issue

append.to.file.message: Xconf - Reference in declaration.xconf${csv.sep}CHG_ID${csv.sep}Xconf File: [@{filetoinclude}] referenced to [declaration.xconf]
Xconf - Reference in site.xconf${csv.sep}CHG_ID${csv.sep}Xconf File: [@{filetoinclude}] referenced to [site.xconf]

log.message: Xconf File: [@{filetoinclude}] was already referenced to [site.xconf]
Xconf Property Value [@{value}] added to Multivalued property [@{property}] to [site.xconf]

append.to.file.message: Xconf - Add to Property${csv.sep}CHG_ID${csv.sep}Property Value [@{value}] added to Multivalued property [@{property}] to [site.xconf]
Xconf - Set Property value${csv.sep}CHG_ID${csv.sep}Property: [@{property}] added to [site.xconf]

log.message: Xconf Property Value [@{value}] removed from Property[@{property}] in [site.xconf]

append.to.file.message: Xconf - Remove Value from Property${csv.sep}CHG_ID${csv.sep}Property Value [@{value}] removed from Property[@{property}] in [site.xconf]

target.name: force.register.custom.component
target.description: Force register custom component based on build.properties values

macrodef.name: create.registration.file
macrodef.description: Create component.ia file for server registration

macrodef.name: update.installation.registry
macrodef.description: Update Installation Registry

log.message: TempPatch Installation Fails, check Installation Logs on file:

macrodef.name: create.tp.registration.file
macrodef.description: Create TempPatchName.tp file for server registration

macrodef.name: update.tp.installation.registry
macrodef.description: Update Installation Registry

log.message: START: Rebuilding Content Cache Server jars...
END: Rebuilding of Content Cache Server jars complete.
